name: tickets
description: IT support tickets. One row per case. Conversation turns live in the conversations datastore, linked via ticketId (the ticketId is also the subfolder name under databases/conversations/).

fields.label: Subject
fields.comment: Short summary of the question — used in lists and banners.

fields.label: Description
fields.comment: Full text of what the user asked. Subsequent back-and-forth lives in openit-conversations, not here.

fields.label: From
fields.comment: Name or email. 'unknown' if the asker isn't identifiable.

fields.label: Channel
fields.comment: How the question reached us. 'chat' = the localhost chat-intake form. Other channels available when cloud is connected (channel ingest).

fields.label: Status
fields.comment: incoming = just landed, agent hasn't run (transient). agent-responding = claude -p subprocess running; admin sees an activity banner. resolved = answered (either by agent KB hit or by admin completing). escalated = agent gave up; escalated banner fires. closed = no further action.

fields.label: Assigned to
fields.comment: Name or email of the admin handling this ticket. Null if unassigned.

fields.label: KB articles cited
fields.comment: Filenames in knowledge-base/ used to answer this ticket. Helps the 'answer once' loop stay traceable.

fields.label: Internal notes
fields.comment: Admin-only notes not surfaced in the user-facing reply. E.g. 'declined to capture as KB — one-off issue specific to this user's machine.'
